Regenerate minified files with:

npm install -g uglify-js
for f in $(ls sphinx/search/non-minified-js/); \
do echo $f && \
npx uglifyjs sphinx/search/non-minified-js/$f --compress --mangle --output sphinx/search/minified-js/$f; \
done
